settings.heroTitle: Your Gateway to Premium Living Spaces
settings.heroSubtitle: From cozy bedsitters to luxury two-bedroom apartments and prime plots. We manage, build, and capture your home's legacy.
settings.officeWorkingHours: Mon - Fri: 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM, Sat: 9:00 AM - 4:00 PM
settings.siteDescription: Leading the way in property management and construction across the region. Quality homes, secure investments, and professional media coverage.

services.title: Property Management
services.desc: Comprehensive management for apartments, shops, and residential complexes.

services.title: Construction Contractors
services.desc: Expert building services from foundation to finish. Quality materials guaranteed.

services.title: Photography & Video
services.desc: Professional wedding coverage, photoshoots, and event videography.

services.title: SGR Booking & Pickups
services.desc: Hassle-free SGR train booking and reliable pickup/drop-off services for your convenience.

services.title: Plots & Shambas
services.desc: Prime land for sale and lease. Secure titles and verified locations.

testimonials.name: Sarah Wanjiku
testimonials.content: LPHASK Homes made my dream of owning a home a reality. Their professionalism and attention to detail are unmatched in the Kenyan market.

testimonials.name: John Kamau
testimonials.content: I've worked with many agencies, but LPHASK stands out for their transparency and excellent property management services. Highly recommended!

testimonials.name: Mary Atieno
testimonials.content: Finding a rental was so easy with their search tool. The property was exactly as described, and the move-in process was seamless.

properties.title: Premium 2 Bedroom
properties.description: Experience luxury living in the heart of the city. This premium 2-bedroom apartment offers breathtaking views, modern finishes, and top-tier security. Perfect for professionals and small families.

properties.title: Standard 1 Bedroom
properties.description: A cozy and affordable 1-bedroom apartment located in a quiet suburban neighborhood. Features a spacious balcony and reliable water supply.

properties.title: Executive Bedsitter
properties.description: Modern executive bedsitter in the vibrant Westlands area. Ideal for students or young professionals looking for a secure and connected living space.

properties.title: Modern Shop Space
properties.description: Prime commercial space in a high-traffic market area. Perfect for retail or service-based businesses.

properties.title: Prime Residential Plot
properties.description: Ready to build residential plot in the prestigious Green Valley estate. Fully serviced with water and electricity on site.

properties.title: Development Land
properties.description: Spacious development land overlooking the hillside. Ideal for residential or mixed-use projects.

properties.title: Investment Plot
properties.description: A large plot suited for commercial development or long-term investment with easy access to major roads.

properties.title: Executive Residential Plot
properties.description: Exclusive estate plot in a gated community with power and water lines available at the boundary.
